name: Shared Documents
description: Access documents, photos, and videos that users have uploaded

function.name: list_shared_docs
function.description: List documents, photos, and videos that have been uploaded and shared. Returns file names, types, sizes, who uploaded them, and sharing status.

filter.description: Optional filter: 'photos' for images only, 'videos' for videos only, 'docs' for documents only. Omit for all files.

function.name: read_shared_doc
function.description: Read the text content of an uploaded document (PDF, txt, md, csv). Use the doc_id from list_shared_docs.
